alt: Wild red panda perching on a mossy branch in mountain forest
caption: Red pandas use an enlarged wrist bone as a false thumb to grip bamboo stalks, independently evolving the same trick as giant pandas.
attributionText: Photo by Soggy Pandas via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0
